ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dog_breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the dog breed */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the breed */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the breed */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the breed */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Typical activity level of the breed */,
  "health_issues" TEXT /* Common health issues associated with the breed */,
  "suitable_for" TEXT /* Types of households suitable for the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range of the dog */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range of the dog */,
  "food_amount" REAL /* Recommended amount of food per day */,
  "calorie_intake" REAL /* Recommended daily calorie intake */,
  "feeding_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended feeding frequency */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the dog */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions the dog may have */,
  "special_diet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the recommendation is for a special diet */,
  "vet_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the recommendation is vet-approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pet owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the pet owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the pet owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the pet owner */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dogs" (
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog's owner */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog's breed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "current_weight" REAL /* Current weight of the dog */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the dog */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the dog */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions the dog may have */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dog is spayed or neutered */,
  "vaccinations" TEXT /* Vaccination history of the dog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES pet_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES dog_breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feeding_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feeding plan */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nutrition recommendation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the feeding plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the feeding plan */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the dog */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions the dog may have */,
  "vet_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the veterinarian regarding the feeding plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeding_plans_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeding_plans_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES nutrition_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight跟踪" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight entry */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog */,
  "weight_date" TEXT /* Date the weight was recorded */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight recorded */,
  "vet_visit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weight was recorded during a vet visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or observations about the weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight跟踪_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory of the product */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet the product is suitable for */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of main ingredients in the product */,
  "calories_per_serving" REAL /* Calories per serving of the product */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pet owner */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address for shipping the product */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES pet_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier for the payment */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_diets" (
  "diet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special diet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dietary need */,
  "products" TEXT /* Associated products that meet the dietary need */,
  "recommended_products" TEXT /* List of recommended products for the special diet */,
  "vet_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the special diet is vet-approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diet_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dietary plan */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dog */,
  "diet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the special diet */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dietary plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dietary plan */,
  "vet_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the veterinarian regarding the diet plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diet_plans_diet_id FOREIGN KEY ("diet_id") REFERENCES special_diets ("diet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diet_plans_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)
